headline: Honeywell International Inc. (HON): One of the Best Military Drone Stocks to Buy Right Now
summary: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is among the 10 Best Military Drone Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 31, the company announced that it had partnered with Odys Aviation to deliver a counter-unmanned aerial system. The initiative is expected to strengthen domestic aviation leadership in the United States through the deployment of home-built drone systems […]

headline: 3M Gears Up to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
summary: MMM heads into Q1 earnings with revenue and EPS growth expected, backed by strong industrial demand but weighed down by Consumer segment weakness.
